content: Existing Self-Refine frameworks that rely on single-perspective iterative feedback can be upgraded by integrating multiple inconsistent self-reflection perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanism research, creating a multi-perspective Self-Refine pipeline that still requires no extra training or external supervision. This hybrid framework would resolve the common limitation of single-perspective self-refinement getting stuck in local suboptimal outputs by leveraging inconsistent self-criticism to surface unrecognized flaws in intermediate iterations.
